name: Pureed Peas a La Clamart
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the peas with cold water and bring to a boil.
Drain and return the peas to the pot.
2. Add butter, chicken broth, onion, salt, and pepper.
Return to a simmer until the peas are soft and most of the liquid has evaporated.
3. Peel potatoes and cut into thin slices. Boil in salted water for about 20 minutes, then drain.
4. Puree the peas and half of the potatoes. Mix the pea puree with half of the potato puree in a serving bowl.
5. Add more of the remaining potatoes until the mixture is nicely thickened.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Keep warm until serving.
